hooks.command: sh -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codex/hooks/user_prompt_submit_router.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/python3 "$SCRIPT"'
sh -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_tool_use_policy.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/python3 "$SCRIPT"'
sh -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codex/hooks/post_tool_use_review.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/python3 "$SCRIPT"'
sh -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_compact_checkpoint.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/python3 "$SCRIPT"'
sh -lc 'ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; SCRIPT="$ROOT/.codex/hooks/stop_verification_gate.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then exit 0; fi; /usr/bin/python3 "$SCRIPT"'
